name: AiSOC — one-click dev
//image: Prebuilt image is published by .github/workflows/devcontainer-build.yml. It drops Codespaces cold-start from ~5 min → ~30 s by baking Node + pnpm + Python (+ uv) + Go + Docker + gh into a single layer instead of resolving them via `features:` on every boot.
//build: Fallback for local devcontainer-cli use and for forks that don't have GHCR pull access. The `image` directive above wins; the build block is only consulted by tooling like `devcontainer build`.
//features: We intentionally do NOT enable docker-in-docker / python / go / github-cli features here — they are baked into the image at build time. Re-enabling them would cancel the cold-start win.
//onCreateCommand: Runs once at image-spawn time. The pnpm store is already warm in the prebuilt image, so `--frozen-lockfile=false` here is fast (≤ 30 s on a green Codespace).
postAttachCommand:
echo '
>>> AiSOC dev container is ready.
>>> To run the demo, open a terminal and run:
>>>     pnpm aisoc:demo --no-open
>>> Then click the forwarded port 3000 in the Ports panel.
>>> Or, no-Docker:  pip install -e packages/aisoc-sandbox && aisoc-sandbox demo
'
